title: Are they on the same ladder?
text: It might seem like theory → law is a progression of certainty, but ask yourself: does a law explain *why* something happens, or just describe *what* happens?

title: Different jobs, not different ranks
text: Laws and theories answer different questions. Newton's Law of Gravitation describes the force; General Relativity (a theory) explains it via spacetime curvature. More evidence doesn't turn one into the other.
